calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Garson Soe for Kendell Won (Administrator).

The Court stated that it now has a proposed order and the original guardianship letters. The Court also stated that the only remaining issue is that the declaration is still in the form of an Attorney declaration, that it is not signed by the Fiduciary, that the Fiduciary needs to be on top of everything that is going on, and it needs to be signed and verified by the Administrator. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is taken under submission. If the Court receives the declaration by August 29, 2017, it will grant the petition. If the declaration is not received by then, the matter will be restored back to the Court's calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Continued To Aug-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Garson Soe for Administrator.

Mr. Soe stated that he has a declaration addressing the Probate Examiner's questions ready to be filed and that there is a guardianship. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to August 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
